page_content:
Formerly: EDPL752.

EDHI754 Higher Education Finance (3 Credits)

Economic perspectives on higher education. Ways of financing higher education and current finance issues. Higher education budget concepts and processes.

Credit Only Granted for. EDHI754, EDPL754, or EDPS754.

Formerly: EDPL754.

EDHI755 Federal Policies in Post-Secondary Education (3 Credits) Evolution of the federal role, its current scope and funding. Policy issues associated with federal student aid programs, research grants and social equity regulations.

Cross-listed with: EDPS755.
